title: Plug
description: Plug: Plug gains are defined as the amount of sensible heat contributed by electrical receptacle/outlet loads

Sensible.description: The sensible heat contributed by plugs, which contributes to a rise in temperature with no change in phase.

RadiantFraction.description: The radiant fraction depicts the percentage of long wave radiant heat given off by plugs.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
